creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to 04dco from comment #6)

This is a useful finding, especially for upstream.

Right now I have little time I can dedicate to such testing. I also have no IPv6 configured here for various reasons, and doing testing with double stack would be difficult for me and require I dedicate a lot of time to it.

Could you please file the bug upstream yourself? In this way you can properly test proposed patches or give the required information.

If you do please post here the reference to the upstream bug, so I can also followup to it if necessary.
